DEPT#8, JUDGGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT. - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL.PRESENT W/DENNIS HYDE AS COUNSEL DEF, ZOILA PASCUAL PRESENT & IN PRO PER. LOUIS BU, MS. PASCUAL, THE CASE IS TO REMAIN ON CALENDAR FOR CT. TRIAL, PENDING THE RETURN OF THE SIGNED STIP. TO MR. HYDE. UPON RECEIPT OF SIGNED STIP, MR. HYDE WILL REQUEST COURT TO REMOVE FROM TRIAL CAL- ENDAR. TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - RESTITU TION OF PREMISES AT 2408 BRYANT ST, S.F, CA. BY 11-3-96, 5PM - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED - IF DEFS. VACATE AS AGREED, PL. WILL DISM ACTION W/PREJUDICE. IF DEFS DON'T VACATE PL. MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT BY EXPARTE DECL FOR POSSESSION, $6,500 RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY FEES. PL. ATTY.
